testsuite.name: Preview Screenshot Test Engine

testcase.name: ExpenseItemPreview

failure.message: Size Mismatch. Reference image size: 1080x184. Rendered image size: 1080x190 Expected: /Users/shraddhakumar/Downloads/ExpenseTest/feature-expenses/src/screenshotTestDebug/reference/com/shraddha/expensetest/feature/expenses/presentation/dashboard/DashboardScreenshotTest/ExpenseItemPreview_748aa731_0.png Actual: /Users/shraddhakumar/Downloads/ExpenseTest/feature-expenses/build/outputs/screenshotTest-results/preview/debug/rendered/com/shraddha/expensetest/feature/expenses/presentation/dashboard/DashboardScreenshotTest/ExpenseItemPreview_748aa731_0.png

testcase.failure:
com.android.tools.screenshot.differ.ImageVerifier$ImageComparisonAssertionError: Size Mismatch. Reference image size: 1080x184. Rendered image size: 1080x190 Expected: /Users/shraddhakumar/Downloads/ExpenseTest/feature-expenses/src/screenshotTestDebug/reference/com/shraddha/expensetest/feature/expenses/presentation/dashboard/DashboardScreenshotTest/ExpenseItemPreview_748aa731_0.png Actual: /Users/shraddhakumar/Downloads/ExpenseTest/feature-expenses/build/outputs/screenshotTest-results/preview/debug/rendered/com/shraddha/expensetest/feature/expenses/presentation/dashboard/DashboardScreenshotTest/ExpenseItemPreview_748aa731_0.png
at com.android.tools.screenshot.differ.ImageVerifier.verify(ImageVerifier.kt:51) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewScreenshotDescriptor.execute(PreviewScreenshotDescriptor.kt:79) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewScreenshotDescriptor.execute(PreviewScreenshotDescriptor.kt:37) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewAnnotationDescriptor.execute(PreviewAnnotationDescriptor.kt:163) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewAnnotationDescriptor.execute(PreviewAnnotationDescriptor.kt:39) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewMethodDescriptor.execute(PreviewMethodDescriptor.kt:59) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewMethodDescriptor.execute(PreviewMethodDescriptor.kt:28) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(Unknown Source) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewScreenshotTestEngineDescriptor.around(PreviewScreenshotTestEngineDescriptor.kt:38) at com.android.tools.screenshot.descriptor.PreviewScreenshotTestEngineDescriptor.around(PreviewScreenshotTestEngineDescriptor.kt:26)

testsuite.system-out: unique-id: [engine:preview-screenshot-test-engine] display-name: Preview Screenshot Test Engine
